title: Convolvulus subacaulis
taxonomy: Convolvulus subacaulis is classified within the family Convolvulaceae. This family belongs to the order Solanales. At the kingdom level, it is classified as Plantae. Within the kingdom Plantae, it is further classified as Angiosperm, indicating that it is a flowering plant. Convolvulus subacaulis is a type of flowering plant commonly known as the dwarf morning glory.

side_effects: Convolvulus subacaulis, also known as dwarf bindweed, is a plant native to Australia and New Zealand.
